project: Sandow workout engine (workout.cool parity, adapted to Vite+Dexie PWA)

features.acceptance: Bilingual (he/en) catalog of 50 exercises with muscle/equipment/type/mechanics + label maps + JS filter (ANY equipment AND ANY muscle). Verified: builder renders 50 exercises in Hebrew.
Dexie v2 loggedSessions table + repo/hooks; existing tables untouched. Verified: a finished workout writes one loggedSession (sets/volume/exercises/duration correct).
Equipment + muscle chips filter the catalog; tap to add/remove exercises; Start launches the session. Verified end-to-end.

Zustand+localStorage store; per-set reps/weight, complete toggles, chronometer from startedAt (survives reload), rest timer, prev/next. Finish saves exactly one loggedSession then clears local state. Verified: log set 10x50 → saved volume 500.
History list + 112-day contribution heatmap + streak + this-week + total volume from loggedSessions. Verified rendering with a real logged session.
Optional structured multi-session programs. Premium gating is a documented no-op in the free PWA (everything unlocked). Deferred.
